PROP-baseauction-inv-034.text: safeTransferFrom failure (bidder lacks assetOut balance/approval) must revert entire bid().
PROP-baseauction-inv-034.assertion: forall bid: safeTransferFrom fails => entire bid() reverts atomically

locations.note: safeTransferFrom at the end of bid(); if it reverts, the entire transaction including prior safeTransfer is rolled back
